title: Old Wolf Barks
description: This changes the wolf noises back to the classic ones.
body:
![Image with a minecraft wolf with the text to the left of it saying old wolf barks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3018afc7aecf84ce19c0f93964e8d71be360c229.jpeg)

Changes the new wolf noises added in 25w08a back to the classic ones.
